label: hand
groundingNote: a part of someone's body; there are two of these parts, one on one side of the body, one on the other side; someone can do very many things with these parts; when someone wants to touch a thing, to {urn:kernel-v0:take|take} a thing, this someone can do it with this part
notes: NSM universal molecule 'hands'. Highest-leverage mint: grounds ~20 manual-action lemmas transitively (pick/hold/grab/throw/catch/...).
